title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrates Rocket 1.0, a platform designed to maintain context across multiple AI tools like Perplexity, Claude, and Cursor in a unified workflow. The video showcases building a startup MVP from idea to launch using Rocket's integration capabilities and competitive intelligence layer.
writeup: This tutorial demonstrates Rocket 1.0, a platform that maintains shared context across separate AI tools including Perplexity, Claude, and Cursor within a single workflow. The walkthrough builds a startup MVP from initial idea to launch, using Rocket's integration capabilities and its competitive intelligence layer. The core takeaway is that persistent context across tools, rather than isolated prompting in each app, is what ties research, planning, and coding into one process.
